info.title: Items API
info.description: Item microservice — manages items, classes, UOMs, vendor mappings, and price lists.

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of active item classes.
Returns a single item class by ID.

put.summary: Updates an existing item class (ItemNature is non-editable post-create).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The item class ID to update.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The item class ID to delete.

post.summary: Clones an item class with a new code and name.

requestBody.description: The new code and name for the clone.

get.summary: Returns the singleton item settings record (defaults if never saved).

put.summary: Creates or updates the singleton item settings.

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of vendor mappings; filterable by itemId and vendorId.

post.summary: Creates a vendor-item mapping with purchase UOM grid and pricing.

get.summary: Returns a full vendor mapping with purchase UOM grid and pricing slabs.

put.summary: Updates a vendor mapping (ItemId and VendorId are non-editable post-create).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The vendor mapping ID to update.

requestBody.description: The updated values. UOM grid and pricing collections are fully replaced.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a vendor mapping (blocked if referenced in an active PO).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The vendor mapping ID to delete.

post.summary: Clones a vendor mapping, optionally targeting a different item or vendor.

requestBody.description: Optional override for target item or vendor; clone is never preferred by default.

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of items; filterable by class, type, and nature.

parameters.name: itemType
parameters.description: Filter by item type enum value.

parameters.name: itemNature
parameters.description: Filter by item nature (Goods or Service).

post.summary: Creates a new item with all sub-entities.

requestBody.description: The item to create including alternate UOMs, specs, drawings, and thresholds.

get.summary: Returns a full item record including all sub-entities.

put.summary: Updates an item (ItemNature and dimension flags are non-editable post-create).

requestBody.description: The updated item values. Sub-entity collections are fully replaced.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes an item (blocked if transaction history exists).

post.summary: Deep-clones an item including all sub-entities.

requestBody.description: The new name and SKU for the clone.

get.summary: Returns a paginated list of price lists ordered by priority (highest first).

post.summary: Creates a price list with pricing slabs.

requestBody.description: The price list to create including line items.

get.summary: Returns a price list with all pricing slabs.

put.summary: Updates a price list (ApplicableTo is non-editable post-create).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The price list ID to update.

requestBody.description: The updated values. Line items collection is fully replaced.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a price list (blocked if linked to an active SO or contract).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The price list ID to delete.

post.summary: Clones a price list as Draft with a new name.

requestBody.description: The new name for the clone.

get.summary: Returns a single UOM by ID.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a UOM (blocked if used on any item).
